# getascraper/how-to-scrape-pubmed

> how-to-scrape-pubmed is an Apify actor that extracts structured data from PubMed.
> Built with TypeScript. Free tier available.

## Overview
- PubMed scraper and data extraction API
- Extracts: title, authors, abstract, pmid, doi, mesh_terms
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel
- Free tier: 10,000 results/month

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-pubmed/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/pubmed-rag-extractor

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-pubmed/blob/main/README.md
- REST API: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-pubmed/blob/main/README.md

## Pricing
- Free tier: 10,000 results/month
- Starter: Contact for pricing
- Business: Contact for pricing

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-pubmed/issues
- Apify Discord: https://discord.gg/apify
